meaning: 梅克伦堡州[德意志民主共和国州名](濒波罗的海)
examples: Kraepelin, the son of a civil servant, was born in 1856 in Neustrelitz, in the Mecklenburg district of Germany.
Robert Mecklenburg began using Unix as a student in 1977 and has been program-ming professionally for 23 years.
Major Gerald Smith of the Charlotte-Mecklenburg Police Department said, "the curfew is a tool that we will use to keep the peace."
The Left Party could displace the CDU as the Social Democrats' governing partner in the eastern state of Mecklenburg-West Pomerania.
Joseph Brown, 62, has been held in the Mecklenburg County jail since his arrest Sept. 14 in a Charleston, S.C.
